caption: In a clinical simulation setting, two individuals wearing blue sterile gowns, surgical masks, and gloves are positioned around a table covered with a blue sterile drape. One person stands in the background, while the other, with hair tied in a bun, is focused on preparing instruments on the table. They are manipulating a small white object, possibly a swab or a piece of gauze, over a sterile tray. In the background, a medical mannequin head is visible on a red surface, alongside some equipment and a computer monitor. On-screen text appears in the bottom corners of the frames: a purple circle on the left contains the text "Day 2", and the text "Sim Week" appears on the right accompanied by a small icon. Across the frames, the movements are minimal, showing the person in the foreground subtly adjusting the item in their hands while maintaining a sterile technique.
